plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Casa Systems CMTS and broadband access devices. The current public OID facts confirm the Casa enterprise root, casaMgmt subtree and casaModuleCpuMemMib module direction, but no stable leaf OID or enum semantics are confirmed for shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health metrics. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets and ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — Casa Systems CMTS and broadband access devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
